content.thinking:
Looking at the findings:

1. **omission** (critical) in s1: Need to add the prerequisite that this section only shows incremental differences on top of an already-implemented paging feature.

2. **section_issue** (minor) in index: False positive, no action needed.

I need to add the prerequisite note to s1 that the sorting implementation assumes paging (`custom_tag_paging_paging`) is already implemented, and only shows the differences from that.

index.title: ページングを使用しない一覧表示

content.text:
The fix applies the critical omission: s1 now opens with a **前提** (prerequisite) note stating that the implementation assumes paging (`custom_tag_paging_paging`) is already in place and only shows the differential implementation. This prevents an AI from presenting the sorting implementation as self-contained.

The minor `section_issue` finding was confirmed as a false positive (RST transition line, not a content section) and required no change.

result:
The fix applies the critical omission: s1 now opens with a **前提** (prerequisite) note stating that the implementation assumes paging (`custom_tag_paging_paging`) is already in place and only shows the differential implementation. This prevents an AI from presenting the sorting implementation as self-contained.

The minor `section_issue` finding was confirmed as a false positive (RST transition line, not a content section) and required no change.
